name: Eggplant with Chicken (or Tofu)
recipeIngredient: 1/3 lb Boneless chicken breast, OR 1/4 lb Tofu
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the garlic.
2. Chop the red chili peppers.
3. Slice the unpeeled eggplant crosswise into slices 1/8 inch thick.
4. Thinly slice the chicken (or cut tofu into 1/2 inch cubes).
5. Heat the oil in a pan.
6. Add the garlic and stir fry until light brown.
7. Add the eggplant and chicken (or tofu) to the pan; cook for five to seven minutes.
8. Add the red chili peppers, basil leaves, and yellow bean sauce; mix well.
9. Serve immediately, as the eggplant and basil will turn dark if the dish sits after cooking.
